text.title: Claude Code Hooks Reference Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the hooks methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-event-and-matcher
step.action: Pick the lifecycle event (PreToolUse blocks, PostToolUse cleans, SessionStart inits, Stop guards). Pick matcher (tool name regex or `*`).

step.name: write-script-under-60s
step.action: Write the hook script (Bash / Python / Node). Must complete in < 60s (target < 5s). Exit 0/1/2 semantics.
step.decision-gate: If logic exceeds 60s, refactor to dispatch an Agent or external job and return immediately.

step.name: wire-audit-log
step.action: Add structured logging (JSONL). Every block / allow decision is logged with timestamp + tool + args_hash + reason.

step.name: register-in-settings
step.action: Add the hook entry under `hooks.<event>` in `~/.claude/settings.json` or project `settings.local.json`.

step.name: test-and-roll-out
step.action: Trigger expected allow case. Trigger expected block case. Confirm audit log entries.
step.output: Hook validated; rolled out to team.
